params.bitmapHash: keccak256 of the player's prediction bitmap
params.configHash: active configHash the player's bitmap is built against
params.depositAmount: USDC amount to deposit (transferred from player wallet)

accumulatedRealFees().notice: Pending fees (backed by L3 USDC in contract)

createBatch(bytes32,bytes32,uint256,uint.notice: Create a new batch for a sourceId.

currentTickId(uint256).notice: Get current tick ID for a batch, with underflow guard

joinBatchDirect(uint256,bytes32,uint256,.notice: Join a batch via direct USDC transfer from player wallet.

settleBatch(uint256,address[],uint256[],.notice: Settle an entire batch in one transaction (round-based flow).         USDC is transferred directly to player wallets.

updateBitmap(uint256,bytes32,bytes32).notice: Update prediction bitmap. Enforces lock window.
